metadata.description: Professional Chinese writing assistance based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with strict anti-AI-taste enforcement.

plugins.name: writing-polish
plugins.description: Professional writing assistance and revision. v5.1 大刀阔斧重构 L3 多智能体审校：单一 orchestration-guide.md 教主对话自主判断（1 路 Opus R2 + 3-5 路 Sonnet R1），对齐 Anthropic Multi-Agent System 2025-06 范式 + Cognition clean-context 2026-04 范式。三层 hybrid 不变：L1 硬 Gate scan + L2 主对话 inline LLM Judge + L3 multi-agent。SKILL.md 344→90 行（Anthropic Progressive Disclosure）。零外部 API。基于《怎样写作》方法论的中文写作辅助与审稿润色。
